name: Marina Acacia Wood Patio Side Table: Weather-Resistant, Round & Compact - Christopher Knight Home
description: Indulge your inner mod with this funky Christopher Knight Home Marina Acacia Wood Side Table. With a trendy round top and three legs that jut out cheekily, this piece will surely give your outdoor space a bit of youthful rejuvenation. Handcrafted lovingly from acacia to with stand the elements. Perfect to place next to a lounge chair or outdoor seating set to put your drink on during those hot summer days. This Christopher Knight Home Marina Acacia Wood Side Table is a perfect addition to your outdoor space.
